user.title: Подключиться к TimescaleDB
user.description:
Введите URL-адрес подключения PostgreSQL для вашего экземпляра TimescaleDB.

Формат: `postgresql://user:password@host:5432/dbname`

Дополнительные параметры доступны после настройки через **Настроить**.

error.cannot_connect: Не удалось подключиться к базе данных. Проверьте URL.

data_description.record_states: Write every state change to TimescaleDB
data_description.record_events: Write Home Assistant events to TimescaleDB
data_description.include_domains: Only record entities from these domains.
data_description.exclude_domains: Never record entities from these domains
data_description.include_entity_globs: Only record entities matching these patterns
data_description.exclude_entity_globs: Never record entities matching these patterns
data_description.exclude_attributes: Drop these attribute keys before writing

data_description.batch_size: Number of rows accumulated before a flush is triggered
data_description.max_queue_size: Maximum pending writes before oldest are dropped
data_description.buffer_on_failure: Keep events in memory and retry when the database becomes available again

data_description.enable_stats_io: Expose write counters, buffer size and duration as sensors
data_description.stats_chunk_interval: How often stats are refreshed from the database
data_description.enable_stats_size: Expose per-table sizes and compression ratios
data_description.stats_size_interval: How often stats are refreshed from the database

data_description.enable_table_areas: Keep a mirror of HA areas in TimescaleDB
data_description.enable_table_devices: Keep a mirror of HA devices in TimescaleDB
data_description.enable_table_entities: Keep a mirror of entity registry in TimescaleDB
data_description.enable_table_integrations: Keep a mirror of integrations in TimescaleDB
data_description.enable_table_users: Keep a mirror of HA users in TimescaleDB

data_description.compress_after: Compress chunks older than this interval
data_description.ssl_root_cert: Path to the CA certificate file
data_description.ssl_cert_file: Path to the client certificate file
data_description.ssl_key_file: Path to the client private key file

error.must_record_something: Должен быть включен хотя бы один вариант записи.
